summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact shows all 11 listed refs are open pull requests, no security-sensitive items were detected, no shared canonical was provided, and merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked by the job. Each PR is kept independent for normal maintainer or author follow-up; no close-style action is recommended.
